config.script:
#define TYPEID_SPECIAL_COMMAND 1 #define TYPEID_FIRST_STANDARD 10000 #define ERRCODE_IMPORT_FAILED -101
#define TYPEID_SELFMAPID 2
#macro PREPARE_KEY(_str_type_,_var_key_) lcase(_str_type_ + "|" + cstr(_var_key_))
class CADO2NXDHandler private m_pExportPackage private m_pExportMsg private m_pMapDict private m_nAutoIdObj private m_fpObjectProvider private m_pImporter private m_pPerforming private m_nObjectCounter private m_pSourceConnection private m_nError private m_strErrDesc private m_nLevel
private sub class_initialize() set m_pExportPackage = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.exportpackage") set m_pMapDict = doc_.system.activex("scripting.dictionary") set m_pExportMsg = nothing set m_fpObjectProvider = nothing set m_pSourceConnection = nothing set m_pImporter = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing m_nObjectCounter = 0 m_nAutoIdObj = 0 m_nError = 0 m_strErrDesc ="" m_nLevel = clng(1) end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pExportPackage = nothing set m_pExportMsg = nothing set m_pMapDict = nothing set m_fpObjectProvider = nothing set m_pSourceConnection = nothing set m_pImporter = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub required_init(byref pSourceConnection,byref fpObjectProvider) set m_pSourceConnection = pSourceConnection set m_fpObjectProvider = fpObjectProvider end sub
public function get_source() set get_source = m_pSourceConnection end function
public property get errordesc() errordesc = m_strErrDesc end property
public sub start_export2stream(byref pOutputStream,byval nMsgType,byval strInfo) 'inicjuj strumień if m_pImporter is nothing then pOutputStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbCrLf end if 'podłącz m_pExportPackage.ostream pOutputStream set m_pExportMsg = m_pExportPackage.newmsg()
'wypełnij i zapisz header with m_pExportMsg .header("msgtype") = clng(nMsgType) .header("format") = clng(NXD_MESSAGE_FORMAT) .header("description") = strInfo end with if m_pImporter is nothing then m_pExportMsg.header.save else dim bBreak m_pImporter.OnMessageBegin m_pExportMsg.importmessage(),bBreak end if end sub public sub stop_export() if m_pImporter is nothing then m_pExportMsg.Save m_pExportPackage.Save else dim bBreak m_pImporter.OnMessageEnd m_pExportMsg,bBreak end if end sub
public sub set_importer(byref pImporter) set m_pImporter = pImporter end sub
public function is_error() is_error = (m_nError <> 0) end function
public function new_object(byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj) if nIdObj <= 0 then m_nAutoIdObj = m_nAutoIdObj + 1 nIdObj = m_nAutoIdObj end if set new_object = m_pExportMsg.newobj(nTypeId,nIdObj) end function
public function new_special_object() set new_special_object = m_pExportMsg.newobj(TYPEID_SPECIAL_COMMAND,m_nObjectCounter+1) end function
public function new_nocu(byref pADORS,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval varSrcType,byval varSrcObjKey) dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = new CA2NOCU pNOCU.init Me,pADORS,nTypeId,nIdObj,varSrcType,varSrcObjKey set new_nocu = pNOCU end function
'maps ADO -> NXD public sub setmapping(byval strSrcType,byval varSrcKeyId,byval nDestType,byval nDestIdObj) dim strKey : strKey = PREPARE_KEY(strSrcType,varSrcKeyId) m_pMapDict.Item(strKey) = cstr(nDestType) + ";" + cstr(nDestIdObj) end sub
public function getmapping(byval strSrcType,byval varSrcKeyId,byref nDestType,byref nDestIdObj) dim strKey : strKey = PREPARE_KEY(strSrcType,varSrcKeyId)
if m_pMapDict.Exists(strKey) then dim strItem : strItem = m_pMapDict(strKey) dim nSep : nSep = instr(1,strItem,";") nDestType = clng(left(strItem,nSep - 1)) nDestIdObj = clng(mid(strItem,nSep + 1)) getmapping = true else getmapping = false end if end function
public function ismapping(byval strSrcType,byval strSrcKeyId) dim strKey : strKey = PREPARE_KEY(strSrcType,varSrcKeyId) ismapping = m_pMapDict.Exists(strKey) end function
public function process_object(byref pExportObject) : process_object = true if m_pImporter is nothing then pExportObject.save m_nObjectCounter = m_nObjectCounter + 1 if m_nObjectCounter mod 20 = 0 then if pExportObject.typeid > TYPEID_FIRST_STANDARD then dim pStdObjDef : set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pExportObject.typeid) show_progress "Wykesportowano element nr " + cstr(m_nObjectCounter) + " (" + pStdObjDef.humanname + ")" end if end if else dim bBreak : bBreak = false m_pImporter.OnObject pExportObject,bBreak process_object = not bBreak if bBreak then m_nError = ERRCODE_IMPORT_FAILED m_strErrDesc = "Import danych zgłosił błąd" end if end if end function
public function get_ref_id(strSrcType,varKey) : get_ref_id = 0 dim nDestType dim nDestIdObj if not getmapping(strSrcType,varKey,nDestType,nDestIdObj) then '-- import object m_nLevel = m_nLevel + 1 nDestIdObj = m_fpObjectProvider(me,strSrcType,varKey) m_nLevel = m_nLevel - 1 end if get_ref_id = nDestIdObj end function
public sub hide_progress() set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub show_progress(strText) if m_pPerforming is nothing then set m_pPerforming = doc_.performing(strText) else m_pPerforming.text = strText end if end sub
public function get_level() get_level = m_nLevel end function end class
class CA2NOCU 'ADO to NXD Object Convert Utility private m_pADO2NXDHandler private m_pExpObject private m_pStdObjdef4Map private m_pADORS private m_idObjExp
private sub class_initialize() set m_pADO2NXDHandler = nothing set m_pExpObject = nothing set m_pStdObjdef4Map= nothing set m_pADORS = nothing m_idObjExp = 0 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK done
set m_pADO2NXDHandler = nothing set m_pStdObjdef4Map= nothing set m_pADORS = nothing end sub
public sub init(byref pA2NH,byref pADORS,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval varSrcType,byval varSrcObjKey) set m_pADO2NXDHandler = pA2NH set m_pADORS = pADORS
set m_pExpObject = m_pADO2NXDHandler.new_object(nTypeId,nIdObj) m_idObjExp = m_pExpObject.idobj m_pADO2NXDHandler.setmapping varSrcType,varSrcObjKey,m_pExpObject.typeid,m_pExpObject.idobj if nTypeId <> TYPEID_SELFMAPID then set m_pStdObjdef4Map = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(nTypeId) end if end sub
public sub done() if not m_pExpObject is nothing then if not m_pADO2NXDHandler.is_error() then m_pADO2NXDHandler.process_object m_pExpObject end if set m_pExpObject = nothing end if end sub
public function std_convert_ado2nxd(byval strNXDField,byref varValue) dim pFieldDef : set pFieldDef = m_pStdObjdef4Map.field(m_pStdObjdef4Map.getfieldindex(strNXDField)) select case pFieldDef.sqltype case SQLlong std_convert_ado2nxd = clng(varValue) case SQLdate if isnull(varValue) then std_convert_ado2nxd = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() else std_convert_ado2nxd = cdate(varValue) end if case SQLcurrency, SQLqty if isnull(varValue) then std_convert_ado2nxd = ccur(0.0) else std_convert_ado2nxd = ccur(varValue) end if case SQLtime std_convert_ado2nxd = clng(varValue) case else if pFieldDef.sqltype < SQLsmall then dim nFldLen : nFldLen = pFieldDef.sqltype if nFldLen > 8192 then nFldLen = nFldLen - 8192 end if if isnull(varValue) then std_convert_ado2nxd = "" else std_convert_ado2nxd = rtrim(left(cstr(varValue),nFldLen)) end if else std_convert_ado2nxd = Empty end if end select end function
public sub map_field(strNXDField,strADOField) m_pExpObject(strNXDField) = std_convert_ado2nxd(strNXDField,m_pADORS(strADOField).value) end sub
public sub map_ref(strNXDField,strSrcType,varKey,bCondition) if bCondition then m_pExpObject(strNXDField) = clng(m_pADO2NXDHandler.get_ref_id(strSrcType,varKey)) else null_ref strNXDField end if end sub
public sub null_ref(strNXDField) m_pExpObject(strNXDField) = clng(0) end sub
public sub mark_as_child(byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byval strParentList,byval nListLP) m_pExpObject("_parent_type") = clng(nParentTypeId) m_pExpObject("_parent_idobj") = clng(nParentIdObj) m_pExpObject("_parent_list") = cstr(strParentList) m_pExpObject("_list_lp") = clng(nListLP) end sub
public sub mark_as_last_child() m_pExpObject("_last_child") = clng(0) end sub
public sub mark_save_now() m_pExpObject("_save_now") = clng(0) end sub
public sub mark_begin_unit() m_pExpObject("_begin_unit") = clng(0) end sub
public sub mark_end_unit() m_pExpObject("_end_unit") = clng(0) end sub
public property let field(strNXDField,varValue) m_pExpObject(strNXDField) = varValue end property
public property get field(strNXDField) field = m_pExpObject(strNXDField) end property
public property get idobj() idobj = m_idObjExp end property end class
function new_ado2nxd_handler() set new_ado2nxd_handler = new CADO2NXDHandler end function
